mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO preference.synthetic_personas ( id, persona_key, display_name, description, generator_version, seed, noise_rate, is_active ) VALUES
( CAST(#{row.id} AS uuid), #{row.personaKey}, #{row.displayName}, #{row.description}, #{row.generatorVersion}, #{row.seed}, #{row.noiseRate}, true )
ON CONFLICT (generator_version, persona_key) DO UPDATE SET display_name = excluded.display_name, description = excluded.description, seed = excluded.seed, noise_rate = excluded.noise_rate, is_active = true, updated_at = now()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM preference.synthetic_persona_tag_preferences preference USING preference.synthetic_personas persona WHERE preference.persona_id = persona.id AND persona.generator_version = #{generatorVersion}
mapper.select: WITH ranked_enrichments AS ( SELECT enrichment.id, enrichment.provider, enrichment.external_place_id, row_number() OVER ( PARTITION BY enrichment.provider, enrichment.external_place_id ORDER BY enrichment.enriched_at DESC NULLS LAST, enrichment.updated_at DESC, enrichment.id ) AS version_rank FROM preference.place_tag_enrichments enrichment WHERE enrichment.status = 'SUCCEEDED' ), selected_enrichments AS ( SELECT id, provider, external_place_id FROM ranked_enrichments WHERE version_rank = 1 ORDER BY provider, external_place_id LIMIT #{limit} ) SELECT CAST(enrichment.id AS text) AS enrichment_id, enrichment.provider, enrichment.external_place_id, tag.code AS tag_code, place_tag.confidence, place_tag.weight FROM selected_enrichments enrichment JOIN preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags place_tag ON place_tag.enrichment_id = enrichment.id JOIN preference.preference_tags tag ON tag.id = place_tag.tag_id AND tag.is_active = true ORDER BY enrichment.provider, enrichment.external_place_id, place_tag.rank_order, tag.code
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO preference.synthetic_swipe_events ( persona_id, provider, external_place_id, reaction, place_tag_enrichment_id, generator_version, seed, persona_place_score ) VALUES
( CAST(#{row.personaId} AS uuid), #{row.provider}, #{row.externalPlaceId}, #{row.reaction}, CAST(#{row.enrichmentId} AS uuid), #{row.generatorVersion}, #{row.seed}, #{row.personaPlaceScore} )
ON CONFLICT (persona_id, provider, external_place_id, generator_version, seed) DO UPDATE SET reaction = excluded.reaction, place_tag_enrichment_id = excluded.place_tag_enrichment_id, persona_place_score = excluded.persona_place_score, generated_at = now()
